## vscode-icons

File-type icons in `src/NoteMode/Assets/FileIcons/` are derived from the
[vscode-icons](https://github.com/vscode-icons/vscode-icons) project,
licensed under the MIT license. The original SVGs were rendered to
multi-resolution `.ico` files for use as Windows file-association icons.

Icons used:
- `text.ico`    — `file_type_text.svg`
- `config.ico`  — `file_type_config.svg`
- `html.ico`    — `file_type_html.svg`
- `csharp.ico`  — `file_type_csharp.svg`
- `shell.ico`   — `file_type_shell.svg`
- `sql.ico`     — `file_type_sql.svg`

See `LICENSE` for the full MIT license text.
